Domestic Box Office $71,502,303Details
International Box Office $38,224,497
Worldwide Box Office $109,726,800
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$207,042 (0.3% of total gross)
Legs:11.26 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:65.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/1,787 max. theaters, 8.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $132,412,724

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 22nd, 2004 (Limited) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: January 7th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
February 3rd, 2005 (Limited) (New Zealand)
August 8th, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: April 5th, 2005 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language, some strong sexual content and nudity.
Running Time: 127 minutes
Award nomination: 2005 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Screen Actors Guild Outstanding Performance by a Cast in a Motion Picture Winner, Writers Guild of America Best Adapted Screenplay Winner
Plot point: Road Trip, Writing and Writers
Social setting: Golden Years
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
